topic.title: 3 destinations ou voyager avec 1500 CAD
reasons: Top 3 destinations fit the CAD 1500 budget.
Best estimate in group: Mexico at 1470 CAD.
Estimated total leaves $30 in your budget.
Your balanced style lines up with Food and Culture travel.

sourceNotes: Uses directional planning estimates only for departure cities with available origin pricing; unavailable origins do not receive synthetic fares.
Daily costs are modeled in CAD for budget, mid-range, and luxury travel styles in Mexico.
These estimates are not live prices or guarantees; actual fares, hotel rates, exchange rates, and availability can vary.

contents.script:
Tu as $1,500 et 7 jours?
Depuis Montreal, ces 3 destinations passent dans les estimations GoByBudget.
Mexico: environ $1,470.
Guatemala: environ $1,420.
Colombia: environ $1,490.
Mexico est l'option la plus basse de ce groupe.
Les prix sont des estimations, pas des garanties.
Teste ton propre budget sur GoByBudget.
